title: Bootstrap Utilities Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of single-purpose helper classes for spacing, colors, sizing, and responsive design tweaks.

questions.question: Which and/or what are 'utility classes' in Bootstrap?
options: Small, single-purpose helper classes used to fine-tune layout and design in HTML.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which class would you use to remove all padding from an element?
What is the primary benefit of Bootstrap's utility-first approach?
options: It allows for quick and consistent design adjustments without writing custom CSS.
It only works for mobile apps.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the correct naming convention for a margin-top of size 3 in Bootstrap?
Do Bootstrap utilities support responsive design using breakpoints like md or sm?
options: Yes, as they provide breakout classes (e.g., text-md-start or p-sm-5) for different screens.
No, they only work for fixed widths.
